title: [ConstantFolding] Fold powf in single-precision.
author: rj-jesus
description:
This is the second part of #183099.

This patch folds powf with constant arguments in single-precision.  This avoids folding calls that would otherwise set ERANGE, for example (https://godbolt.org/z/zexsT373f).

comments.author: efriedma-quic
comments.body: I don't really want to spend time reviewing changes to ConstantFolding routines given we have a plan to rewrite this code soon.  Is this causing practical issues for you?

comments.author: rj-jesus
comments.body:
> I don't really want to spend time reviewing changes to ConstantFolding routines given we have a plan to rewrite this code soon. Is this causing practical issues for you?

If this code is going to be changed and fixed soon, then there's no urgent need for this PR, thanks.
